pi_items.source: Calculated mathematically via radians(51.51) and verified against task constraints.
Calculated mathematically via radians(-0.13) and verified against task constraints.
Calculated via Python 'ephem' module for Sun at 2024-05-28 09:18:00 UTC at Mecca (Lat 21.42 N, Lon 39.83 E), which yields ~89.85 deg (approx 90).

Calculated via Python 'ephem' module for Sun at 2024-05-28 09:18:00 UTC at London (Lat 51.51 N, Lon -0.13 W), which yields ~118.85 deg (approx 119). Confirmed Qibla bearing calculation is ~118.98 deg.
Verified from export_result.sh and verifier.py explicit path requirements.
Verified from setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicit path requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The required location coordinates for London correspond to ~0.899 rad latitude and ~-0.002 rad longitude. The expected altitude of the sun in Mecca at the time of Rasd al-Qibla (2024-05-28 09:18:00 UTC) is approximately 90 degrees, and its azimuth from London is approximately 119 degrees, which was independently verified using PyEphem and geodetic initial bearing calculations. The expected report and screenshot directories exactly match the validation scripts.
